audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. `_onAuctionEnd` has exactly one call site (L366 in `performUpkeep`), and `delete s_auctionStarts[asset]` at L367 executes unconditionally on every non-reverting path — no branching exists between L366 and L367. The `GPV2CompatibleAuction` override calls `super._onAuctionEnd` and does not touch `s_auctionStarts`, so the virtual dispatch does not affect the invariant.
